name: agentic-dev-kit
description: Catalog of Claude Code skills, agents, and commands for agentic frontend development.

plugins.name: agentic-dev-kit
plugins.description: One opinionated frontend pipeline for Turborepo + pnpm, Next.js web, bare React Native CLI, Figma MCP, TanStack Query, and a Frappe backend. Bundles 10 skills (web/native components, feature slices, design-system tokens, web-to-native migration, Zustand global-state slices, plus Next.js, React, React Native, and TypeScript expertise), the design-qa agent, and the init-dev-kit / design-qa / feature-slice / zustand-slice commands. Run /agentic-dev-kit:init-dev-kit after enabling to install the CLAUDE.md guardrails into your project. Coupled by design — adopt together, not cherry-picked.
